Description:
Ballistics of the 152.4x547.5mmR OF-540 high-explosive fragmentation shell fired from the gun-howitzer D-20. The ammunition and gun is produced in the PRC as the WB007P, and with piezoelectric fuze, the WB036P HE-Frag shells and the Type 66 152mm gun-howitzer, respectively.

Charge design reference Type 66, with the full-variable charge:
Charge	Load 				Peak Breech P.		Muzzle Velocity
Full	8.035 kg 双芳-3 18/1-23  				<=2350 kgf/cm²		655 m/s
	+ 0.15 kg 8/1 Rosin-Potassium			(258 MPa)
No.1	7.145 kg 双芳-3 18/1-23				>=900 kgf/cm²		606 m/s
	+ 0.15 kg 8/1 Rosin-Potassium			(98.8 MPa)

The following measurements are known: barrel length is 4240 mm, chamber length is 6.5 dm, breech to start of rifling measures 772.9mm. 

References:
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
